cot_prefix: Okay, let's see. The question is asking what made Woolworth a world-famous man. The options are A, B, C, D. Let me go through the passage again to make sure I get the right info. The passage starts by talking about his early life, being poor and not wanting to be a farmer. He took a business course and became a salesman. He discovered his skill in displaying goods, which led to an event where he sold items at five cents each, and that was successful. Then he opened his own store with five and ten cent goods.
